description: Real open-set seeds (round 006 batch1, AI-reviewed accepted, kappa 0.63 vs human) fed through the payoff pipeline. Per item: the source text and the detector's accepted gap-seeds. Tests whether weaving detector-found gaps beats a strong model's unaided gap-spotting.

items.title: AG News Business #0

items.text: Calif. Aims to Limit Farm-Related Smog (AP) AP - Southern California's smog-fighting agency went after emissions of the bovine variety Friday, adopting the nation's first rules to reduce air pollution from dairy cow manure.
